title: Our Department Lecturer Dr. Murat BAYRAKTAR's New Book Has Been Published!
content:
Our Department Lecturer Dr. Murat BAYRAKTAR's New Book Has Been Published!

Titled "The Evolution of Tourism: Early Pilgrimage to Space Tourism: A Comprehensive History of Tourism's Evolution," the book offers a compelling account of how humanity's passion for travel (tourism) has shaped over millennia. Beginning with religious journeys in ancient times (12,000 BC Göbeklitepe), it traces the evolution of tourism through the ages, the mass tourism brought about by the industrial revolution, and today's understanding of luxury, digital, and sustainable travel. It also sheds light on future travel, such as space tourism, presenting a unique journey from the past to the present. A comprehensive and inspiring work for those interested in tourism, academics, and anyone who understands the impact of travel on humanity. We wish our lecturer continued success and hope for widespread readership.

This content was updated on 10/04/2026.
